jobs.title: Fast Food Worker
jobs.description: It's not your dream job, but it's a step in the right direction!

jobs.title: Retail Associate
jobs.description: Working in retail can help you develop customer service skills and gain experience in a fast-paced environment.

jobs.title: Warehouse Worker
jobs.description: Warehouse work can provide valuable experience in logistics and inventory management, and it can be a stepping stone to more advanced roles in the future.

jobs.title: HTML Tag Architect
jobs.description: As an HTML tag architect, your job is to find orphaned tags and close them. This is serious business.

jobs.title: Div-Bricklayer
jobs.description: As a div-bricklayer, your job is to build walls of divs. It's a tough job, but someone's gotta do it.

jobs.title: Certified Professional Indenter
jobs.description: As a certified professional indenter, your job is to indent code properly. This is a highly sought-after skill in the world of web development.
